articles.title: In stunning display of stupid, secret CISA credentials found in public GitHub repo
articles.content: SSH keys, plaintext passwords, other sensitive data had been up since November 2025.
articles.titleZh: 在公共GitHub存储库中发现令人惊叹的愚蠢秘密CISA凭据
articles.contentZh: SSH密钥、明文密码和其他敏感数据自2025年11月以来一直在上升。

articles.title: Zero-day exploit completely defeats default Windows 11 BitLocker protections
articles.content: It's not entirely clear how the exploit works. Microsoft says it's investigating.
articles.titleZh: 零日漏洞完全击败默认的Windows 11 BitLocker保护
articles.contentZh: 目前尚不完全清楚漏洞是如何运作的。微软表示正在进行调查。

articles.title: Cisco announces record revenue and 4,000 layoffs in the same day
articles.content: Layoffs are "not a savings-driven restructure," CFO says.
articles.titleZh: 思科在同一天宣布创纪录的收入和4000次裁员
articles.contentZh: 首席财务官表示，裁员“不是由储蓄驱动的重组”。

articles.title: Linux bitten by second severe vulnerability in as many weeks
articles.content: Production-version patches are coming online and should be installed pronto.
articles.titleZh: Linux在多周内被第二次严重漏洞咬伤
articles.contentZh: 生产版补丁即将上线，应立即安装。

articles.title: Android 17 is getting its own version of Apple’s Handoff
articles.content: Google is adding a new Android feature that resembles Apple's Handoff, allowing you to start a task on your Android phone and continue it right where you left off from a compatible tablet. "Continue On" is designed to eventually be bidirectional, but Google says that at launch it will only support tasks moving from a […]
articles.titleZh: Android 17即将推出自己的苹果Handoff版本
articles.contentZh: Google正在添加一项类似于Apple Handoff的新Android功能，允许您在Android手机上启动任务，然后在兼容平板电脑上中断的地方继续执行任务。“继续”的设计最终是双向的，但谷歌表示，在发布时，它只支持从[…]移动的任务

articles.title: Samsung workers set to strike at worst possible time
articles.content: More than 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers are gearing up for an 18-day strike after bonus payment negotiations between the company and its union collapsed. The strike is set to start on Thursday and will be limited to Samsung's domestic chipmaking plants, raising concerns around the already constrained production of memory chips amid the ongoing shortage. […]
articles.titleZh: 三星员工将在最糟糕的时间罢工
articles.contentZh: 在三星电子与其工会之间的奖金支付谈判破裂后，超过47,000名三星电子员工正在准备为期18天的罢工。罢工定于周四开始，将仅限于三星的国内芯片制造工厂，这引发了人们对持续短缺的情况下已经受限的内存芯片生产的担忧。
